creator: ti@orthomedcenter.com.br
text:
Created attachment 151596
Here is the detailed trap error and Zpool import

When booting up my system, i get this trap 12 error and freeze. I have a ZFS volume array installed in the system that I used as a NAS share. But all of a sudden the system crashes, and when i tried to reboot it didn't. I tried to put the devices on other systems, but when ever i tried to "zpool import" i get a fatal trap. The original system gives me trap 12, but when I try to import using newer systems i get fatal trap 9. So i narrow the bug down to the zpool import command when its booting up.

I need to recover this file structure at all costs!
